json_data.title: Searching Algorithms
json_data.reason: Sorting algorithms often prepare data for efficient searching, making this a natural and complementary next step at a similar foundational level.

json_data.title: Parallel and Distributed Algorithms
json_data.reason: As datasets grow, applying sorting algorithms efficiently often requires understanding how to design them for parallel or distributed computing environments.

json_data.title: Algorithmic Lower Bounds
json_data.reason: This topic delves into the theoretical minimum computational resources required for problems like sorting, providing a deeper understanding of fundamental algorithmic efficiency limits.
